mapper.select: /*QurryId=RoInfoMapper.selectList*/ SELECT A.ASN_NO , A.RO_NO , A.VIN , B.PT_NO , B.PT_NM FROM T_RO_INFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN T_PART_MST B ON A.PT_NO = B.PT_NO WHERE A.ASN_NO = #{asnNo} ORDER BY A.ASN_NO, A.RO_NO LIMIT 3 OFFSET #{page}
mapper.update: /*QurryId=RoInfoMapper.test*/ UPDATE T_RO_INFO SET VIN = 'MYBATIS TEST' WHERE ASN_NO = '203000' AND RO_NO = '202506W000001'
